summary: Harden stack updates and prove a Linux Hermes campaign
description: Harden stack updates and prove a Linux Hermes campaign
acceptance: Template bootstrap detects and fast-forwards an existing clean stack or stops with an actionable divergence error
Linux CI runs stack and template checks plus a Hermes-compatible build critic repair resume campaign
An opt-in real Hermes acceptance command is available and refuses to claim proof when Hermes is absent

evidence.summary: RED proved existing bootstrap fetched without fast-forwarding; GREEN fast-forwards clean main and blocks divergence, deterministic campaign now uses Hermes CLI protocol, opt-in live script returns NOT PROVEN without Hermes, Linux and template workflows parse, 46 tests pass on macOS and Debian Python 3.12 Docker, both make checks pass in Linux.
